title: acer tonkinense subsp. fenzelianum
intro: Acer tonkinense subsp. fenzelianum, also known as the Fenzel's maple or Fenzelian maple, is a subspecies of maple tree native to Vietnam. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, derived from its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Acer tonkinense subsp. fenzelianum include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as cancer and diabetes. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, extracts, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety in human use.
